Kyiv official: The drone debris fell on the territory of a cemetery in the Solomianskyi district.

data.title: Soluna and Sazmining Announce 3 MW Bitcoin Mining Operation at Project Dorothy 1B
data.description: Soluna Holdings, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol SLNH, has revealed a new partnership with Sazmining in the field of green data centers for advanced computing tasks like Bitcoin mining and artificial intelligence. This collaboration will assist in establishing Sazmining's second U.S. mining operation, starting with an initial deployment of 3 MW at Soluna's Project Dorothy 1B. The partnership is poised to expand in the future, pending further developments.

data.title: Cross Country Healthcare Marks 40 Years, Accelerates Next Generation of Workforce Intelligence and Orchestration
data.description: Cross Country Healthcare is celebrating its 40th anniversary by enhancing its workforce intelligence and orchestration through expanded artificial intelligence and predictive analytics. This initiative aims to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of the company's operations.
POLISH FOREIGN MINISTER SIKORSKI SAYS POLAND WILL CONTINUE TO PUSH FOR THE RELEASE OF ALL POLITICAL PRISONERS IN BELARUS

data.title: Lakewood-Amedex Biotherapeutics Appoints Joseph Tucker, Ph.D., to Board of Directors
data.description: A recent board appointment has bolstered the expertise of Lakewood-Amedex Biotherapeutics Inc. This addition brings in a seasoned biotech executive, aimed at enhancing the company's capabilities following its recent direct listing on Nasdaq as LABT. As a clinical-stage biotechnology company, Lakewood-Amedex is focused on advancing a unique class of treatments. The development took place in Sarasota, Florida, on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Tamboran Schedules 3Q FY26 Earnings Release and Webcast
data.description: In New York, Tamboran Resources Corporation is set to unveil its third quarter financial results and operational progress post NYSE market closure on May 13, 2026. CEO Todd Abbott will lead a webcast at 5:30pm EDT discussing developments in the Beetaloo Basin. The session will also feature a brief Q&A with analysts. To join the live audio webcast for the conference call, access details will be provided in advance.

data.title: H&M's Debut on Nordstrom Marks Brand's First Curated Retail Marketplace Launch in U.S.
data.description: On April 28, 2026, the renowned fashion label H&M revealed its excitement about debuting on Nordstrom Marketplace. This move is set to significantly increase the brand's visibility and offer fashion-forward consumers a fresh avenue to explore its popular collections. This milestone signifies a strategic expansion for H&M and opens up opportunities for a wider audience to access their coveted designs.
UKRAINIAN PRESIDENT VOLODYMYR ZELENSKYY THREATENED TO SANCTION ISRAELI INDIVIDUALS AND BUSINESSES BUYING GRAIN PRODUCED IN REGIONS OCCUPIED BY RUSSIA.

data.title: Avicanna Welcomes Initial U.S. Rescheduling of Medical Cannabis & Provides Scientific Update
data.description: The rescheduling decision is in line with Avicanna's pharmaceutical and medical cannabis approach. This change will aid in the progress of research and development, clinical trials, and medical operations.

data.title: LivAway Suites® Breaks Ground in Las Vegas, Continuing its Nationwide Surge
data.description: On April 28, 2026, LivAway Suites® established itself as a rapidly growing independent hotel brand amidst changing travel habits and a surge in demand for adaptable accommodations. The company is expanding significantly and has made a significant mark in one of the nation's top destinations.

data.title: careviso releases Real-Time Pharmacy Benefit Feature within seeQer
data.description: Vienna, Virginia - As of April 28, 2026, careviso, a prominent player in automation-driven patient access solutions, has unveiled its latest enhancement on the seeQer technology platform. This update introduces the real-time pharmacy benefit function, intended to provide comprehensive visibility into both medical and specialty pharmacy benefits.

data.title: Spin Master and Feld Motor Sports Supercharge their Collaboration to Drive Another Decade of Monster Jam® Toys
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Spin Master Corp. disclosed the extension of its global master toy licensing agreement with Feld Motor Sports for Monster Jam® for another decade. The agreement, valued at a significant amount, reinforces Spin Master Corp.'s position as a key player in the children's entertainment industry. The collaboration signifies a long-term commitment to delivering high-quality products to consumers and maintaining a strong presence in the market. The renewal is set to bolster both companies' market positions and drive continued success in the industry.

data.title: Soligenix Announces Interim Results from the Phase 3 FLASH2 Trial Evaluating HyBryte™ in Treatment of Cutaneous T-Cell Lymphoma
data.description: Soligenix, a biopharmaceutical company based in Princeton, New Jersey, recently revealed important information on April 28, 2026. The company, trading on Nasdaq under the symbol SNGX, specializes in developing and bringing to market treatments for rare diseases lacking adequate medical solutions. In their latest announcement, Soligenix shared updates on their late-stage data analysis.

data.title: Aveanna to Participate at the Barclays 30th Annual Leveraged Finance Conference
data.description: A healthcare company, Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. (“Aveanna”) (NASDAQ: AVAH), revealed plans to participate in the Barclays 30th Annual Leveraged Finance Conference in Austin, TX on May 19, 2026. During the event, Aveanna's management team will hold individual meetings with investors.

data.title: Ping An Reports Steady 7.6% Growth in Operating Profit Attributable to Shareholders of the Parent Company in Q1 2026, Life & Health NBV Increases 20.8% YoY
data.description: Ping An Insurance (Group) Company of China, Ltd. revealed its financial results for the initial quarter of the year recently. The group, listed as HKEX: 2318 and SSE: 601318, disclosed that its total assets have reached over RMB14 trillion as of now. This figure underscores the significant financial standing and growth of Ping An in the current market scenario.

data.title: Plus Therapeutics Secures Blue Shield of California Coverage for CNSide® Cerebrospinal Fluid Assay for Metastatic CNS Cancer
data.description: The availability of CNSide® for metastatic CNS cancers has been extended to an additional 6 million covered lives, further boosting its commercial presence and accessibility.

data.title: Kiniksa Pharmaceuticals Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Recent Portfolio Execution
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, ARCALYST ® (rilonacept) recorded a net product revenue of $214.3 million, marking a 56% year-over-year growth. The expected net product revenue for ARCALYST in 2026 has been raised to a range of $930 to $945 million. The data for the Phase 2 trial of KPL-387 in recurrent pericarditis is anticipated in the second half of 2026, with the Phase 3 pivotal trial set to commence by the end of the year. As of Q1 2026, the cash balance stood at $468.1 million. A conference call and webcast are slated for 8:30 am ET today.

data.title: Exodus Movement Appoints Receiver in United Kingdom to Take Control of Monavate and Baanx
data.description: Omaha, Nebraska - On April 28, 2026, Exodus Movement, Inc. (NYSE American: EXOD), a prominent self-custodial cryptocurrency platform, declared the activation of its contractual authority to designate Receivers in the United Kingdom to manage Monavate Holdings Limited, Monavate Ltd, and Baanx.com Ltd. These entities are subsidiaries of W3C Corp, and their shares were pledged as collateral for a secured loan. W3C defaulted on the loan, prompting Exodus to take control of these three companies through the appointed Receivers.
